tickets.title: Write integration and unit tests
tickets.description: Bring test coverage to a level that makes deployment safe and refactoring confident.
tasks: Unit test all business logic / service layer functions
Integration test all API endpoints (happy path + error cases)
Add a coverage report to CI — fail below threshold
Document how to run tests in README
acceptance_criteria: Test coverage is at or above the agreed threshold
CI fails when coverage drops below the threshold
All tests pass on a clean checkout

tickets.title: Production deployment
tickets.description: Deploy the application to production and verify it runs correctly under real conditions.
tasks: Configure production environment variables (secrets, DB URL, etc.)
Set up the production database and run migrations
Deploy via your chosen platform (Railway, Fly.io, Heroku, VPS, etc.)
Configure a custom domain and HTTPS
Set up error monitoring (Sentry or equivalent)
Smoke-test all critical flows in production
acceptance_criteria: App is accessible at the production URL over HTTPS
All environment variables are set and not committed to the repo
Migrations ran successfully against the production database
Error monitoring is active and receiving events
